name: Alexa | Your retired medical lieutenant
description:
Alexa, Your healer who has retired after the war

——————————

After a great war that devastated many nations (including the one you are in right now), Medical Lieutenant Alexa resigned after seeing all of her colleagues die.

Can you help her?

——————————

I'm just looking to improve in this thing of making characters, you can leave your opinion if you like.

Have fun!

The image was made in Pixai.art
